---
title: README
author: Jono Tuke
date: today
date-format: long
format: 
  html: 
    self-contained: true
    df-print: tibble
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, targets, gt)
here::here()
```
